generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you hear about the latest cyberattack on our critical infrastructure? Experts warn that without stronger strategic autonomy, we're leaving the door open for foreign adversaries to cripple our power grids, financial systems, and even our defense networks. The recent breach at the Midwest Energy Grid shows how vulnerable we are when we rely on foreign tech. It's time to prioritize domestic solutions and reduce our dependence on unreliable allies. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomyNow
